fixSummaryByRootCause.clarification_punt_for_history_query: Shared clarification fallback now auto-answers when remaining grounded candidates are overlapping execution paths rather than materially distinct user choices.
fixSummaryByRootCause.unnecessary_clarification: Direct event live-volume analysis is now exposed on the answer surface, and shared completeness guidance tells the runtime to execute one-shot fallback-capable tools before asking for internal-method clarifications.
fixSummaryByRootCause.ungrounded_tool_invocation: Completeness repair guidance now explicitly retries raw-query-capable tools before returning plan stubs or identifier requests, reducing planner punts on deictic single-market prompts.
fixSummaryByRootCause.execution_parse_failure: Event whale breakdown now reads structured get_top_holders output instead of JSON-parsing the text payload, removing the runtime parse failure path.
fixSummaryByRootCause.missing_grounded_market_reference: Shared completeness guidance now treats fallback-capable raw-query tools as mandatory attempts before returning missing-input style answers.
fixSummaryByRootCause.plan_without_execution: Repair instructions now force execution of raw-query-capable tools before leaving the run at ready_for_execution or missing_input.
fixSummaryByRootCause.tooling_gap_for_cross_venue_validation: The runtime is now steered away from false capability-miss conclusions when an authorized cross-venue tool can resolve the raw contract request itself.
fixSummaryByRootCause.deictic_event_substitution: Named-outcome event comparison now refuses to silently substitute a fallback event for "this event" without explicit grounding.
fixSummaryByRootCause.candidate_selection_drift: Live-market activity fallback tiers no longer widen all the way to distant contracts when the request says ending soon.
fixSummaryByRootCause.overstated_synthesis: The rerun validates against the currently deployed workflow plus stricter completeness guidance; remaining overstated synthesis risk is tracked if the final narrative still overclaims conviction.
